_comment: Flint & Tinder service catalogue. Updated quarterly. Last reviewed 2026-04-12 by Sam.

services.description: Per-product identity package: primary mark + label + can art + tap handle treatment, fitting into an existing brand system. Includes 2 rounds of revision and final production files. Does not include a full brand system buildout from scratch (that is ID-100).

Five-week launch creative across paid social, OOH, and in-store. Default mix: campaign concept + 4 short-form video edits + 12 static social posts + 2 billboard layouts + in-store collateral pack. Buyout / talent / print are pass-through.
Half-day local shoot. Includes 1 location, 1 talent, 30 retouched stills, 4 short-form video edits. Talent buyout, location permit, and any travel beyond Calgary are pass-through.
Monthly retainer for paid social campaign management. Ad spend is billed through at cost, never marked up (see pricing rule MEDIA_PASS_THROUGH).

Ground-up brand system: positioning, primary + secondary marks, full type + colour system, motion principles, and a brand guidelines document. Out of scope for Cold Front (Northstar already has an Aurora/Glacier system in place).
